title: Aftershock
description: Based on the Tremor series, this mod adds the Precambrian monsters of the deep into your Minecraft experience!
body:
# Introducing a new menacing predator lurking beneath the earth's surface - the Graboids!
This mod brings the American Graboid lifecycle to life, allowing you to experience the thrill of facing off against these formidable creatures in the dirt and sand. Get ready to be fully immersed in a world where survival means staying one step ahead of these deadly predators.

Sponsored by BisectHosting Need a server to play with friends? Don't know how to setup one? Just rent an already configured server from BisectHosting! Click on the picture above, select plan(at least 4GB), and get 25% off your first month and enjoy playing with your friends!
